title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
